hooks.command: echo 'BLOCKED by webstack: .env files contain secrets — webstack does not allow AI Read access. Source them in your shell instead.' && exit 1
echo 'BLOCKED by webstack: .env.local files contain secrets — webstack does not allow AI Read access.' && exit 1
echo 'BLOCKED by webstack: .env.*.local files contain secrets — webstack does not allow AI Read access.' && exit 1
echo 'BLOCKED by webstack: secrets.local.* files are protected.' && exit 1
echo 'BLOCKED by webstack: cannot read .env files via shell either.' && exit 1
echo 'BLOCKED by webstack: printenv on secret-named variables is blocked.' && exit 1
echo 'BLOCKED by webstack: bare `env` exposes all environment variables including secrets.' && exit 1
test -f .webstack/manifest.yaml && echo '— webstack project detected. Run /webstack:feature to add a feature, /webstack:infra for infra changes, /webstack:deploy to deploy.' || true

test -f .webstack/SETUP.md && ! test -f .webstack/manifest.yaml && echo '— webstack init partially complete. Read .webstack/SETUP.md, sign up for free-tier services, then run /webstack:infra.' || true
